title: Role of Crop Diversification in India’s Agricultural Growth

summary.about: How diversifying away from a narrow cereal base can improve Indian farm incomes, resilience and sustainability.
summary.audience: Agricultural ministries, farmer organizations and rural-development researchers.
summary.method: Reviews policy and production trends and calculates a crop-level Herfindahl–Hirschman concentration index.
summary.insights: India is already relatively diversified, but further movement toward high-value crops can strengthen resilience and respond to changing diets.
